title: Clip Buffer
description: Buffers video frames and detects matching clips using a Visual Similarity Filter.
Polls the filter sparsely every scan_interval seconds. On a match, captures
buffer_seconds of pre-match context and collects forward until a scene change,
then flushes the full clip downstream.

output.description: Clip index and timestamp for each flushed frame.

input.description: Per-frame scene change metadata from frame_grabber (consumed, not forwarded).

visual_similarity.description: Visual similarity filter used to detect frames matching the reference.

clip_buffer.scan_interval.title: Scan interval (seconds)
clip_buffer.scan_interval.description: How often to invoke the visual similarity filter. Lower = more checks, slower.

clip_buffer.buffer_seconds.title: Pre-match buffer (seconds)
clip_buffer.buffer_seconds.description: How many seconds of frames to retain before a match is confirmed.

clip_buffer.scene_threshold.title: Scene change threshold
clip_buffer.scene_threshold.description: scene_change_score value at which a clip is considered complete.
